rows.focus: Interdisciplinary AI safety: apply expertise from other fields (physics, neuro, complex systems, security) to AI risk projects under experienced mentors. Inaugural winter cohort (~20 fellows), Nov 2026–Feb 2027

rows.funder: Centre for the Governance of AI (GovAI)
rows.focus: AI governance & policy research; Research + Applied tracks
AI consciousness, sentience, moral & legal status of AI systems. Research Fellowships + Career Development Fellowships.
rows.funding: Career Dev: living stipend. Research: ~$55k-$150k/yr salary (1-2 yrs) + compute/travel

rows.focus: ML engineering skills for safety
AI security × cybersecurity: control, infra/hardware, adversarial, tech governance
Technical safety + governance, East–West

rows.funder: Cambridge Digital Minds / Rethink Priorities / PRISM
rows.focus: AI sentience, consciousness, moral status - interdisciplinary philosophy track (with Rethink Priorities & PRISM)
Safety evals, robustness, scalable mitigations, agentic oversight, high-severity misuse
rows.funding: Monthly stipend + compute + OpenAI API credits

rows.focus: Safety/security/governance (Black researchers)
Societal/political/economic/legal impacts
Alignment, interp, security (5 tracks)
Safety + governance

rows.program: Center on Long-Term Risk (CLR) Summer Research Fellowship
rows.focus: s-risk research; suffering-focused ethics, philosophy-adjacent
Global priorities research in philosophy & economics; longtermism. NOTE: GPI wound down mid-2025; fellowship continues via successor community.

rows.deadline: Sep 2026 cohort closed (was May 3); EOI open for next cohort
rows.focus: AI safety research with senior mentors: alignment, AI control, evals, scalable oversight; Empirical + Strategy/Governance tracks. 80%+ alumni into full-time AI safety roles (Anthropic, Redwood, METR, UK AISI)

rows.deadline: Rolling; next cohort starts late Sep 2026
rows.focus: Empirical AI security research: adversarial robustness, AI control, cyber offense/defense. Mentors incl. Nicholas Carlini, Keane Lucas. Explicitly seeks pentesting/vuln research/CVE backgrounds — strong fit for AI Security profile
